admissions_process.summary: JU's graduate admission flow is centralized on the Graduate and Entrance Registration pages: applicants review the graduate admission rules, submit the required documents, and complete the registration and fee payment steps.
steps: Review the official graduate admission rules and study mechanism.
Submit the graduate application and required documents.
Meet the degree and equivalency requirements stated on the official admission pages.
Pay the required application and registration-related fees.
Follow the graduate registration mechanism published by the university.

required_documents.summary: JU's official admission text lists a graduate document package built around prior academic credentials, identity documents, and completed application material.
items: Certified identification card or passport copy
Certified high school transcript for three years
Official transcripts for the bachelor's degree or equivalent
Completed application and payment of the required registration fees

language_requirements.summary: No explicit graduate-wide language threshold was published in the recovered official source set. JU does publish foreign-language remedial fees for international/foreign-student cases.
notes: The reviewed sources do not expose a single numeric graduate English/French/Arabic admission threshold.
Foreign-student fee pages mention remedial foreign-language fees, but those are fee rules rather than admission thresholds.

tuition_model.summary: JU publishes a per-credit tuition methodology for graduate study, but the recovered official pages did not expose a complete program-specific graduate tuition schedule that can be safely mapped without inference.
notes: The Tuition & Fees page states that fees are assessed per credit and may include registration/services, housing, and Lebanese social security fees.
The Financial System page publishes first-payment amounts for selected master's and doctoral programs, but those are payment-plan values rather than a full tuition table.
Because the official per-credit graduate rate by program was not fully exposed in the recovered source set, tuition remains unmapped in programs.json.

application_fee.notes: The official admission text references application fees, but the recovered extraction did not expose a numeric graduate application-fee amount.

registration_fee.notes: The official pages reference registration and first-payment steps, but the recovered extraction did not expose a standalone graduate registration-fee amount.

additional_fees.notes: The Tuition & Fees page states that these additional charges may apply alongside the per-credit tuition system.

payment_methods.summary: JU publishes multiple official payment channels for graduate students.
items: Cash payment at the university accounting department
Cash payment at Byblos Bank branches
International transfer to the university account

payment_plans.summary: JU publishes first-payment amounts and installment deadlines in the financial system page for the 2026-2027 cycle.
items: Master's first payment: USD 400 for Public Health Genetics and Control of Infectious Diseases; USD 300 for other master's majors
Doctoral first payment: USD 400 for Islamic Studies and Sharia; USD 500 for Arabic Language and Literature; USD 600 for Business Administration

scholarships.summary: JU's financial-aid page states that scholarships are allocated to different student categories and may cover part or all of the prescribed stage depending on justified need.
items: Scholarships may cover part of the prescribed stage
Scholarships may cover the full prescribed stage
Only the highest scholarship is applied when multiple scholarships are available

financial_aid.summary: JU's financial-aid page states that scholarship percentages apply only to study-unit value and do not include semester or foreign-language fees.
items: Aid applies only to study-unit value
Semester fees are excluded from scholarship percentages
Foreign-language fees are excluded from scholarship percentages
Continuation requires good conduct and compliance with university rules

academic_calendar.summary: JU publishes an official academic calendar page and a student-calendar PDF page.

graduate_regulations.summary: JU's Graduate page exposes official graduate-regulation sections covering admission, study method, required documents, graduation conditions, registration, research progress, jury formation, and general provisions.

international_students.summary: JU's foreign-student page provides international fee sections, hospitality insurance references, remedial language fees, and international transfer details.
items: Hospitalization insurance for non-Lebanese / international students

notes: No explicit accreditation statement was recovered from the reviewed official JU sources in this pass.
